headline: Iban Communities Block 3 Plantation Expansions in Court
context: Three Iban longhouse communities in Sibu obtained court injunctions blocking palm oil expansion onto 12,000 hectares of claimed NCR land.

cards.big: 3 Iban longhouses won injunctions protecting 12,000 hectares of NCR land
cards.sub: Plantation companies began clearing operations without community consent

cards.big: Communities total 2,800 residents across Kanowit and Song districts
cards.sub: Satellite imagery showed 1,400 hectares already cleared before injunction

cards.big: Plantation firm held provisional lease from 2018 Land and Survey approval
cards.sub: Court found lease issued without mandatory Section 6 native consultation

cards.big: Similar cases increased 45% since landmark Tuai Rumah Sandah ruling in 2022
cards.sub: Legal aid groups funded 28 NCR cases in 2025 costing RM3.2 million total

cards.big: Court injunctions test whether indigenous consent is a right or a formality
Three plantation expansions blocked by Iban court action — land rights are won case by case.
